name: "📚 Documentation Improvement"
about: "Fix, improve, or add documentation"
title: "[docs] <short description>"
labels: ["type: docs", "status: needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## What Needs to Change

<!-- Be specific: which file, which section, what is wrong or missing.
Good: "QUICKSTART.md step 3 uses `docker-compose` (V1 syntax) — should be `docker compose` (V2)."
Bad: "The docs are confusing." -->



## Location

<!-- File path(s) in the repo, or URL if it's the public site. -->

- [ ] `README.md`
- [ ] `QUICKSTART.md`
- [ ] `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] `ARCHITECTURE.md`
- [ ] `SECURITY.md`
- [ ] Other: <!-- specify -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] **Fix** — incorrect information, broken link, outdated command
- [ ] **Clarification** — something technically correct but confusing
- [ ] **Addition** — something entirely missing that users need
- [ ] **Restructure** — content exists but is hard to find or navigate
- [ ] **Translation** — adding or correcting a non-English version

## Target Audience

<!-- Who would benefit most from this change? -->

- [ ] First-time user setting up Ogoune
- [ ] Self-hoster maintaining an instance
- [ ] Developer contributing to the codebase
- [ ] Enterprise evaluator
- [ ] All of the above
